content.title: Star Wars: The High Republic — The Blade
content.description: A Phase II character study of the legendary Jedi Porter Engle — the Blade of Bardotta — as a long-buried chapter of his past resurfaces in the early days of the High Republic.

content.title: The High Republic: Path of Deceit
content.author: Justina Ireland & Tessa Gratton
content.description: Set 150 years before the height of the High Republic era, a Jedi Padawan and a member of the mysterious Path of the Open Hand are thrown together on a world at the edge of the galaxy, where a dangerous secret forces them each to question their deepest loyalties.

content.title: The High Republic: Convergence
content.author: Zoraida Córdova
content.description: On the planet Eiram, two noble houses have warred for generations — but an arranged marriage is brokered to end the conflict. When an assassination attempt threatens the peace, a young Jedi must uncover the truth before the fragile truce collapses.

content.title: The High Republic: The Battle of Jedha
content.author: George Mann
content.description: Two opposing sides converge on the holy city of Jedha — sacred to both the Jedi Order and the followers of the Path of the Open Hand. As tensions between them spiral toward open conflict, a pair of Jedi must find a way to prevent all-out war before the city of light is consumed by darkness.

content.title: The High Republic: Cataclysm
content.author: Lydia Kang
content.description: In the aftermath of Eiram and E'ronoh's brief peace, a dangerous Path of the Open Hand cult ignites old wounds and new crises — forcing Jedi and their allies to confront a galaxy on the edge of catastrophe.

content.title: The High Republic: Path of Vengeance
content.author: Cavan Scott
content.description: The Path of the Open Hand's grip on the galaxy tightens as two young women — one a Jedi, one a true believer in the Path — are drawn into a collision course that will test everything they know about loyalty, faith, and the Force.

content.title: Star Wars: The High Republic (2022)
content.description: Marvel's flagship Phase II title, set roughly 150 years before Phase I, following the Jedi of an earlier age as a new threat tests the Order.

content.title: The High Republic: Quest for the Hidden City
content.author: George Mann
content.description: In the earliest days of the High Republic, young Jedi Dass Leffings leads an expedition through a dangerous and uncharted world in search of a legendary hidden city — uncovering ancient Force mysteries and confronting the growing shadow of the Path of the Open Hand.

content.title: The High Republic: Quest for Planet X
content.author: Tessa Gratton
content.description: When a young Jedi and the fearless Wayseeker Silandra Sho discover clues to a mysterious hidden world with a deep connection to the Force, they must race against the forces of the Path of the Open Hand to reach it first — before its secret becomes a weapon.

content.title: Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures – Pathfinders
content.description: A new all-ages Adventures miniseries reviving the line for further young-Jedi tales set during the High Republic era.

content.title: The High Republic: Light of the Jedi
content.author: Charles Soule
content.description: At the height of the Republic's golden age, a catastrophic disaster in hyperspace throws the Jedi Order into a desperate rescue operation — and reveals a terrifying new threat lurking in the darkness between the stars.

content.title: The High Republic: A Test of Courage
content.author: Justina Ireland
content.description: When a catastrophic hyperspace disaster strands young Jedi Vernestra Rwoh and a small group of survivors on a jungle moon with no way to call for help, they must work together to survive — and discover that the disaster was no accident.

content.title: The High Republic: The Edge of Balance, Vol. 1
content.author: Shima Shinya & Justina Ireland
content.description: A young Jedi Knight stationed on the peaceful moon of Banchii faces the chaos of the Great Hyperspace Disaster and must protect her community from a sinister new threat lurking at the edges of the High Republic's golden age.

content.title: The High Republic: The Edge of Balance, Vol. 2
content.author: Shima Shinya & Daniel José Older
content.description: Jedi Knight Lily Tora-Asi returns to Banchii to find her community still reeling — and a deepening darkness closing in that will force her to make impossible choices about where her duty truly lies.

content.title: The High Republic: The Edge of Balance: Precedent
content.author: Daniel José Older
content.description: A companion story to the Edge of Balance manga exploring themes of duty and tradition among the Jedi at the height of the High Republic era.

content.title: The High Republic: The Edge of Balance, Vol. 3
content.author: Shima Shinya & Daniel José Older
content.description: The conflict on Banchii deepens as Lily Tora-Asi's faith in the Force and in her own judgment is pushed to the breaking point by forces far more dangerous than anything she has faced before.

content.title: The High Republic: The Edge of Balance: Premonition
content.author: Daniel José Older
content.description: A companion short story to the Edge of Balance series, offering a glimpse into the futures awaiting the Jedi of Banchii as the High Republic era draws toward its close.

content.title: The High Republic: The Edge of Balance, Vol. 4
content.author: Shima Shinya & Daniel José Older
content.description: The concluding volume of the Edge of Balance manga, bringing Lily Tora-Asi's High Republic journey to its emotional and action-packed close.

content.title: The High Republic: Into the Dark
content.author: Claudia Gray
content.description: A Jedi Padawan and a crew of smugglers become stranded at a derelict space station after a hyperspace disaster — and what they find there may be more dangerous than anything waiting in the dark outside.

content.title: Star Wars: The High Republic (2021)
content.description: Marvel's flagship High Republic title, following the Jedi and the Republic as they confront a terrifying new external threat at the height of the Order's golden age.

content.title: Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures (2021)
content.description: An all-ages series following a group of young Jedi and their Padawans through the same galaxy-spanning crisis seen in the flagship Phase I titles.

content.title: Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures — The Monster of Temple Peak
content.description: A bounty-hunter-and-Jedi miniseries spinning out of the all-ages Adventures line during the height of the High Republic.

content.title: Star Wars: The High Republic: Trail of Shadows
content.description: A noir mystery in which a private investigator and a Jedi hunt for the truth behind a horror stalking the frontier of the galaxy.

issues.title: Way Down Deep in the Dark

content.title: Star Wars: The High Republic: Eye of the Storm
content.description: An origin-focused two-parter exploring the leaders behind the era's central antagonists and the events that set them on their path.

issues.title: Ro: The Truth. The Lie. The Kill.

content.title: Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures Shorts
content.description: A series of bite-sized animated shorts set in the same High Republic world as Young Jedi Adventures, following Kai, Lys, and Nubs on quick missions and fun encounters around Tenoo.

content.description: An animated series following a group of young Jedi younglings as they learn the ways of the Force, go on adventures across the galaxy, and discover what it means to be a Jedi.

content.title: Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures: Galactic Training
content.description: An educational mobile game based on the animated series Star Wars: Young Jedi Adventures, featuring mini-games and activities designed to teach young players the ways of the Jedi.

content.title: Star Wars: Fun with Nubs
content.description: A series of one-minute animated shorts following the loveable Nubs and his droid companion RJ-83 through small, charming everyday adventures on Tenoo.

content.title: Young Jedi Adventures: The Young Jedi
content.author: Lucasfilm Ltd.

content.title: Get Well, Nubs! Little Golden Book
content.author: Emeli Juhlin

content.title: Young Jedi Adventures: The Charhound Chase
content.author: Lucasfilm Ltd.

content.title: Young Jedi Adventures: The Harvest Feast
content.author: Lucasfilm Ltd.

content.title: The Jellyfruit Pursuit Little Golden Book
content.author: Christopher Nicholas

content.title: Snowy Mountain Rescue Little Golden Book
content.author: Lucasfilm Ltd.

content.title: The High Republic: The Rising Storm
content.author: Cavan Scott
content.description: As the Republic Fair celebrates the galaxy's unity, the Nihil strike in their most audacious and devastating attack yet — plunging the Jedi into a desperate fight to protect the innocent and hold back the storm.

content.title: The High Republic: Race to Crashpoint Tower
content.author: Daniel José Older
content.description: As thousands gather on Valo for the Republic Fair, young Jedi Lula Talisola uncovers evidence of an imminent Nihil attack — and must race across the festival grounds to reach Crashpoint Tower before it's too late to save everyone.

content.title: The High Republic: Out of the Shadows
content.author: Justina Ireland
content.description: A Jedi Knight investigating a mysterious hyperspace disaster is pulled into a web of political intrigue and buried secrets — while the shadow of the Nihil continues to fall across the Outer Rim.

content.title: The High Republic: Mission to Disaster
content.author: Justina Ireland
content.description: Jedi Knight Vernestra Rwoh is dispatched to investigate a rash of disasters across Republic outposts — but as the evidence mounts, she begins to suspect that the catastrophes are being engineered by an enemy closer than anyone imagined.

content.title: The High Republic: Tempest Runner
content.author: Cavan Scott
content.description: In the aftermath of a devastating Nihil raid, a young woman is captured and forced to survive within the brutal, cutthroat hierarchy of the galaxy's most feared marauders. Clawing her way up the ranks, she discovers that the only way out may be to go further in.

content.title: The High Republic: The Fallen Star
content.author: Claudia Gray
content.description: The Nihil launch their most devastating strike at the heart of the High Republic — attacking Starlight Beacon itself, turning the galaxy's greatest symbol of hope into a desperate fight for survival.

content.title: The High Republic: Midnight Horizon
content.author: Daniel José Older
content.description: Two young Jedi arrive on the cosmopolitan city-world of Corellia to investigate a Nihil plot — navigating an underworld of crime and corruption while the fate of the Republic hangs in the balance.

content.title: The High Republic: Escape from Valo
content.author: Daniel José Older & Alyssa Wong
content.description: Stranded on a Nihil-occupied Valo, young heroes Zeen Mrala and Lula Talisola must evade the enemy, protect the civilians they've hidden away, and find a way to signal for rescue — all while uncovering a shocking secret about the Nihil's true plans.

content.title: The High Republic: Beware the Nameless
content.author: Zoraida Córdova
content.description: When a young Jedi is sent to investigate a string of attacks that have left Jedi catatonic and helpless, she must confront the terrifying truth about the Nameless — mysterious creatures that seem to feed on the Force itself.

content.title: The High Republic: A Valiant Vow
content.author: Justina Ireland
content.description: As the conflict between the Jedi and the forces threatening the High Republic reaches a desperate turning point, a young hero must honor a dangerous promise — one that will test every ounce of their courage and determine the fate of those they love most.

content.title: The High Republic: The Great Jedi Rescue
content.author: Cavan Scott

content.title: The High Republic: Showdown at the Fair
content.author: George Mann

content.title: The High Republic: The Battle for Starlight
content.author: George Mann

content.title: The High Republic: Jedi Brave in Every Way
content.author: Charles Soule & Rosemary Soule

content.title: Star Wars: The High Republic – Shadows of Starlight
content.description: A bridging miniseries launching Phase III in the aftermath of the fall of the era's great beacon of light.

content.title: The High Republic: The Eye of Darkness
content.author: George Mann
content.description: Years after the fall of Starlight Beacon, the galaxy has been cut off from the Republic by the Nihil's Stormwall. Now the Jedi must find a way to strike back against the darkness — from within.

content.title: The High Republic: Defy the Storm
content.author: Justina Ireland & Tessa Gratton
content.description: With the Nihil's Stormwall isolating the Outer Rim, a group of Jedi and their allies must push beyond its deadly barrier — risking everything on a daring mission to reach those trapped inside.

content.title: The High Republic: Seeds of Starlight
content.author: George Mann
content.description: With the Nihil's grip tightening across the galaxy, a Jedi and their unlikely allies must carry out a covert mission to protect a beacon of hope — planting the seeds of resistance in the darkest hour of the High Republic Era.

content.title: The High Republic: Tempest Breaker
content.author: Cavan Scott
content.description: As the Nihil Stormwall continues to strangle the Outer Rim, a desperate mission to break through the barrier pushes a group of Jedi and their allies to their very limits — with the fate of everyone trapped inside hanging in the balance.

content.title: The High Republic: Temptation of the Force
content.author: Tessa Gratton
content.description: As the Jedi work to dismantle the Nihil from within the Stormwall, a Jedi Knight is drawn toward a seductive and dangerous philosophy — one that could save lives or shatter everything the Order stands for.

content.title: The High Republic: Tears of the Nameless
content.author: George Mann
content.description: A young Jedi investigates a mysterious signal emanating from deep within Nihil-held space — uncovering a secret that could change the course of the war and the understanding of the Force itself.

content.title: The High Republic: Into the Light
content.author: Claudia Gray
content.description: In the final days of the High Republic Era, a Jedi searches for hope amid the wreckage of war — confronting the darkness that has settled over the galaxy and the light she still believes can prevail.

content.title: The High Republic: Haunted Starlight
content.author: George Mann
content.description: In the long shadow of the Nihil's devastation, a Jedi is drawn to a remote outpost haunted by echoes of tragedy — where the line between the living and the dead grows dangerously thin, and an old evil stirs in the darkness.

content.title: Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures – Dispatches from the Occlusion Zone
content.description: All-ages Phase III adventures set inside the blockaded region of space sealed off during the era's darkest hour.

content.title: Star Wars: The High Republic (2023)
content.description: Marvel's flagship final-phase title as the High Republic era hurtles toward its devastating conclusion.

content.title: Star Wars: The High Republic – Fear of the Jedi
content.description: A late Phase III miniseries set as suspicion and fear of the Jedi begin to spread across a galaxy on the brink.

content.title: Star Wars: The High Republic – The Finale
content.description: A single-issue conclusion drawing the entire three-phase High Republic comic initiative to a close.

content.title: The High Republic: Trials of the Jedi
content.author: Charles Soule
content.description: As the conflict with the Nihil reaches its climax, the Jedi Order faces a reckoning — tested in ways that will determine not just the outcome of the war, but the future of the Order itself.

content.title: The Acolyte: Wayseeker
content.author: Justina Ireland
content.description: Set two centuries after the High Republic's golden age, a Jedi on the fringes of the Order follows a trail of dark side energy through a galaxy grown complacent — and discovers a threat the Order is not prepared to face.

content.title: Star Wars: The Acolyte
content.description: Set during the twilight of the High Republic era, a former Padawan and her Jedi pursuers are drawn into a web of secrets connecting a series of shocking crimes to a powerful figure from the past.

content.title: Padawan
content.author: Kiersten White
content.description: A restless young Obi-Wan Kenobi runs away from his master on an unsanctioned mission — and finds himself stranded on a mysterious planet where he must figure out what kind of Jedi, and what kind of person, he wants to be.

content.title: Star Wars: Mace Windu
content.description: A young Mace Windu undertakes a defining early mission that will help shape the Jedi Master he is destined to become.

content.title: Master & Apprentice
content.author: Claudia Gray
content.description: Qui-Gon Jinn and a young Obi-Wan Kenobi travel to a planet on the verge of civil war — where an unexpected prophecy and a difficult decision will test the bonds between master and apprentice.

content.title: Star Wars: Darth Maul – Black, White & Red
content.description: A stylized anthology of Darth Maul short stories rendered in stark black, white, and red.

content.title: Star Wars: Jango Fett
content.description: The galaxy's deadliest bounty hunter takes on a high-stakes job in the years before the Clone Wars.

content.title: The Living Force
content.author: John Jackson Miller
content.description: One year before the Battle of Naboo, the entire Jedi Council travels to the Outer Rim world of Kwenn — a routine trip that becomes anything but, as the Jedi confront questions about their place in the galaxy and the living Force itself.

content.title: Star Wars: Darth Maul (2017)
content.description: Maul chafes against the patience his Master demands, hungering to strike at the Jedi in the years before The Phantom Menace.

content.title: Star Wars: Jedi Knights
content.description: An anthology-style series spotlighting various Jedi of the late Republic across a range of standalone missions.

content.title: Zen – Grogu and Dust Bunnies
content.description: A wordless, meditative short produced in collaboration with Studio Ghibli, following Grogu as he encounters playful dust bunny spirits in a moment of quiet wonder.

content.title: Star Wars: Age of Republic
content.description: Character-spotlight one-shots, each focused on a single hero or villain of the Republic era — from Qui-Gon Jinn to General Grievous.

content.title: Star Wars: The Prequel Trilogy – A Graphic Novel
content.author: Alessandro Ferrari
content.description: A graphic novel adaptation of the three prequel films, following young Anakin Skywalker's journey from a slave boy on Tatooine to a Jedi Knight — and the tragic fall that brought the Republic to ruin.

content.title: Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace
content.description: Two Jedi knights escort a young queen through a political crisis and discover a slave boy with an extraordinary connection to the Force — one that could fulfil an ancient Jedi prophecy.

content.title: The Phantom Menace Read-Along Storybook and CD
content.author: Elizabeth Schaefer

content.title: Star Wars Epic Adventures: The Phantom Menace
content.author: S.T. Bende

content.title: Star Wars Journeys: The Phantom Menace
content.description: An interactive retelling of Star Wars: Episode I – The Phantom Menace, combining motion comic-style visuals with mini-games and collectibles to guide players through the events of the film.

content.title: Star Wars Journeys: Beginnings
content.description: A prequel companion to Star Wars Journeys: The Phantom Menace, exploring the early life of Anakin Skywalker and the events on Tatooine leading up to the Boonta Eve Classic podrace.

content.title: Queen's Peril
content.author: E.K. Johnston
content.description: The untold story of how Padmé Amidala became Queen of Naboo — and how she assembled the handmaidens who would stand beside her, forging bonds of loyalty and friendship in the shadow of an invasion.

content.title: Mace Windu: The Glass Abyss
content.author: Steven Barnes
content.description: In the days after Qui-Gon Jinn's funeral, Mace Windu travels to a remote world haunted by dark-side energy — leading a perilous mission that forces him to confront questions about the Force, leadership, and the nature of evil.

content.title: Padawan's Pride
content.author: Bryan Q. Miller
content.description: Three years after the Battle of Naboo, Anakin Skywalker is still finding his footing as Obi-Wan Kenobi's Padawan. When a routine mission goes sideways, master and apprentice must confront not only a dangerous new threat but the growing tensions in their bond.

content.title: Queen's Shadow
content.author: E.K. Johnston
content.description: Padmé Amidala's reign as Queen ends, and she takes her place in the Galactic Senate — navigating a treacherous political world with the help of her loyal handmaidens as she finds her voice as a senator.

content.title: Star Wars: Obi-Wan and Anakin
content.description: A young Padawan Anakin and his master Obi-Wan are stranded on a hostile world in the years between Episodes I and II.

content.title: Choose Your Destiny: An Obi-Wan & Anakin Adventure
content.author: Cavan Scott
content.description: YOU are in control of the galaxy's greatest Jedi duo. When Obi-Wan Kenobi and his Padawan Anakin Skywalker face a dangerous mission, every choice is yours to make — and the fate of the mission depends on the path you choose.

content.title: Star Wars: Episode II – Attack of the Clones
content.description: A young Jedi is assigned to protect a senator whose life is under threat, while his investigation and a separate mission by his mentor reveal a conspiracy that will drag the Republic into war.

content.title: Attack of the Clones Read-Along Storybook and CD
content.author: Randy Thornton

content.title: Star Wars Epic Adventures: Attack of the Clones
content.author: Ivan Cohen

content.title: Queen's Hope
content.author: E.K. Johnston
content.description: As the Clone Wars begin, Padmé Amidala confronts the cost of the conflict she tried to prevent — while a secret ceremony, lasting promises, and her deepest convictions are tested by a galaxy at war.

content.title: Brotherhood
content.author: Mike Chen
content.description: In the earliest days of the Clone Wars, Obi-Wan Kenobi is dispatched to Cato Neimoidia to investigate a bombing — while Anakin Skywalker, now a Jedi Knight on his own for the first time, must prove himself without his master.

content.title: Dooku: Jedi Lost
content.author: Cavan Scott
content.description: Asajj Ventress is dispatched to recover a mysterious artifact and, in doing so, delves deep into Count Dooku's hidden past — uncovering the story of how a noble Jedi Padawan became one of the most feared men in the galaxy.

content.title: Star Wars: The Clone Wars
content.description: Anakin Skywalker and his newly assigned Padawan embark on a dangerous mission behind enemy lines to rescue a young hostage, testing the new partnership before the full heat of the Clone Wars.

content.title: Star Wars: The Clone Wars

episodes.title: A Sunny Day in the Void
The Jedi Who Knew Too Much

content.description: An animated anthology series expanding the Clone Wars across seven seasons, following Anakin, Obi-Wan, Ahsoka, and countless others through the battles, politics, and moral complexities of a galaxy at war.

content.title: Star Wars Adventures: The Clone Wars – Battle Tales
content.description: Connected Clone Wars short stories told between the front-line battles of the war.

content.title: Star Wars: Hyperspace Stories—Tides of Terror
content.description: A Kit Fisto-led undersea horror miniseries set during the prequel era.

content.title: Star Wars: Jedi of the Republic – Mace Windu
content.description: Mace Windu leads a Jedi squad on a perilous Clone Wars battlefield mission.

arcs.arc: Jedi of the Republic — Mace Windu

content.title: Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi
content.description: A collection of animated short stories exploring pivotal and unseen moments in the lives of Ahsoka Tano and Count Dooku, tracing the diverging paths that led each of them to their destiny.

content.title: Dark Disciple
content.author: Christie Golden
content.description: Based on unproduced Clone Wars scripts, an unlikely partnership forms between a Jedi Master and former Sith assassin Asajj Ventress — tasked with a mission to eliminate Count Dooku before more lives are lost to the war.

content.title: Thrawn Ascendancy: Chaos Rising
content.author: Timothy Zahn
content.description: In the Unknown Regions of the galaxy, the Chiss Ascendancy faces a mysterious enemy unlike any they have encountered before — and a young military officer named Thrawn begins his rise through the ranks.

content.title: Thrawn Ascendancy: Greater Good
content.author: Timothy Zahn
content.description: Thrawn continues to defend the Chiss Ascendancy against unseen threats in the Unknown Regions — but political enemies within the Ascendancy itself may prove more dangerous than any foe beyond its borders.

content.title: Star Wars: Darth Maul — Son of Dathomir
content.description: Adapts unproduced Clone Wars scripts continuing Maul's story as he wages war against his former master; brought into canon.

content.title: Star Wars: Shadow of Maul
content.description: A miniseries serving as a prequel to the Maul: Shadow Lord streaming series.

content.title: The Clone Wars: Season 7: Volume 1
content.author: Lucasfilm Ltd.
content.description: A graphic novel adaptation of the opening arc of The Clone Wars Season 7, following the Bad Batch clone commandos on a mission that tests their loyalty and raises questions about identity and purpose.

content.title: The Clone Wars: Ahsoka vs. Maul
content.author: Lucasfilm Ltd.
content.description: A graphic novel adaptation of the climactic Siege of Mandalore arc from The Clone Wars Season 7, as Ahsoka Tano and Captain Rex pursue a trapped Maul while the Republic falls around them.

content.title: Star Wars: Episode III – Revenge of the Sith
content.description: As the Clone Wars reach their bloody conclusion, a conflicted Jedi hero is pulled toward the dark side by fear of loss, setting in motion a tragedy that will extinguish the Jedi Order and reshape the galaxy.

content.title: Revenge of the Sith Read-Along Storybook and CD
content.author: Lucasfilm Ltd.

content.title: The Prequel Trilogy Read-Along Storybook and CD Collection
content.author: Elizabeth Schaefer & Randy Thornton

content.title: Star Wars: Darth Vader (2017)
content.description: Vader's earliest years as a Sith Lord, immediately following Revenge of the Sith.

content.title: Master of Evil
content.author: Adam Christopher
content.description: In the immediate aftermath of Order 66, Darth Vader is dispatched to a remote world to investigate rumors of a Force-wielding shaman — a mission that forces the new Sith Lord to confront the cost of absolute power.

content.title: Empire Ascendant
content.description: A bridging anthology one-shot linking the first and second waves of Marvel's original-trilogy line.

content.title: Star Wars: The Bad Batch
content.description: A squad of elite clone soldiers with experimental mutations find themselves at odds with the new Empire in the immediate aftermath of the Clone Wars, questioning their identity and searching for a place in a changed galaxy.

content.title: The Bad Batch: Hunted!
content.author: Lucasfilm Ltd.
content.description: In the immediate aftermath of Order 66, the Bad Batch go rogue — hunted by the newly formed Empire while struggling to forge an identity and purpose in a galaxy that no longer wants them.

content.title: Star Wars: Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch—Ghost Agents
content.description: The Bad Batch clone commandos take on a covert new mission during the Imperial era.

content.title: Star Wars: Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch—Rogue Agents
content.description: A further Bad Batch miniseries following the rogue clones through the early Imperial era.

content.title: Inquisitor: Rise of the Red Blade
content.author: Delilah S. Dawson
content.description: The secret origin of the Inquisitorius — following a Jedi who survived Order 66 and is broken, reshaped, and reforged into one of the Emperor's most dangerous dark-side hunters.

content.title: Star Wars: Inquisitors
content.description: An anthology exploring the Empire's Force-sensitive Jedi-hunters and the dark path that forged them.

content.title: Sanctuary: A Bad Batch Novel
content.author: Lamar Giles
content.description: Set during the earliest days of the Empire, Clone Force 99 takes a mission that goes wrong on a world caught between Imperial control and desperate resistance — forcing the Bad Batch to choose who they protect.

content.title: Thrawn Ascendancy: Lesser Evil
content.author: Timothy Zahn
content.description: The Chiss Ascendancy is fracturing from within as rival families conspire for power — and Thrawn must navigate a treacherous political crisis in the Unknown Regions while a greater threat looms beyond.

content.title: Adventures in Wild Space: The Escape
content.author: Cavan Scott
content.description: When Imperial officers board and seize the explorer vessel of the Graf family, siblings Milo and Lina manage to escape — but their parents are taken captive. Stranded in Wild Space, the children must begin a desperate search across the galaxy to rescue them.

content.title: Adventures in Wild Space: The Snare
content.author: Cavan Scott
content.description: Following a lead about their captured parents, Milo and Lina Graf venture deeper into Wild Space — only to walk straight into a trap laid by the Imperial officer hunting them down.

content.title: Adventures in Wild Space: The Nest
content.author: Tom Huddleston
content.description: Milo and Lina Graf are forced down onto a jungle world crawling with enormous and deadly creatures — and with no way to signal for help, they must survive long enough to find a way off before the Empire closes in.

content.title: Adventures in Wild Space: The Steal
content.author: Cavan Scott
content.description: Milo and Lina must pull off a daring heist to steal the information they need to find their parents — right out from under the noses of the Imperial soldiers who have it.

content.title: Adventures in Wild Space: The Dark
content.author: Tom Huddleston
content.description: The Graf siblings follow their parents' trail into a dark and treacherous region of Wild Space — where a ruthless Imperial officer has been tracking them, and the dangers of the unexplored frontier are more terrifying than anything they have faced before.

content.title: Adventures in Wild Space: The Cold
content.author: Cavan Scott
content.description: Milo and Lina arrive on a frozen world to follow a new lead about their parents' location — but the planet's extreme conditions and a dangerous Imperial presence make this their most treacherous stop yet.

content.title: Adventures in Wild Space: The Rescue
content.author: Tom Huddleston
content.description: The Graf siblings' long search for their captured parents finally reaches its climax as Milo and Lina make their most daring and dangerous move yet — a desperate rescue mission into the heart of Imperial captivity.

content.title: Ahsoka
content.author: E.K. Johnston
content.description: One year after Order 66, Ahsoka Tano is living in hiding — until she is drawn into a conflict on a farming moon that forces her to pick up her lightsabers again and choose what she stands for in a galaxy without the Jedi.

content.title: Catalyst: A Rogue One Novel
content.author: James Luceno
content.description: The secret origin of the Death Star — how a brilliant scientist and his family are drawn into the Empire's most terrifying weapons program, and how a decades-long friendship becomes the first crack in the armor of the Empire.

content.title: Lords of the Sith
content.author: Paul S. Kemp
content.description: Darth Vader and Emperor Palpatine are ambushed and stranded on the hostile world of Ryloth — and must fight their way through a rebel insurgency together, revealing the brutal dynamic between master and apprentice.

content.title: Tarkin
content.author: James Luceno
content.description: The definitive portrait of Wilhuff Tarkin — tracing his ruthless rise through the Empire's ranks and exploring the ideology that shaped the man who would command the Death Star.

content.title: Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order
content.description: Set five years after Order 66, Fallen Order follows Cal Kestis, a young Padawan-turned-fugitive surviving as a scrapper on Bracca. When his Force abilities are exposed, he must outrun the Empire's Inquisitors while attempting to rebuild the Jedi Order.

content.title: Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order, Vol. 1
content.author: Mangado & Sideranch
content.description: A graphic novel adaptation of Jedi: Fallen Order's opening act, following Cal Kestis as his hidden Force abilities are exposed and the Empire's deadly Inquisitors are dispatched to hunt him down.

content.title: Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order, Vol. 2
content.author: Mangado & Sideranch
content.description: The second volume of the Fallen Order graphic novel adaptation, as Cal Kestis and the crew of the Mantis press their mission to restore the Jedi Order, facing Inquisitors and ancient secrets at every turn.

content.title: Star Wars: Jedi Fallen Order - Dark Temple
content.description: A prequel to the Jedi: Fallen Order video game following a Jedi Master and her Padawan on a tense diplomatic mission gone wrong.

content.title: Star Wars: Maul - Shadow Lord
content.description: Tracing the rise of Maul as a crime lord in the galaxy's underworld following the Clone Wars, as he builds a criminal empire and consolidates power from the shadows.

content.title: Star Wars: Tales of the Underworld
content.description: An anthology series exploring the criminal underworld of the Star Wars galaxy, following rogues, smugglers, and outlaws navigating danger and moral ambiguity on the fringes of society.

content.title: Star Wars: Han Solo - Imperial Cadet
content.description: Han's washout from the Imperial Academy, bridging events seen in Solo.

content.title: Most Wanted
content.author: Rae Carson
content.description: Before the events of Solo, a young Han and Qi'ra are low-level street scrumrats on Corellia — until a botched job thrusts them into the crosshairs of two rival crime syndicates and forces them to rely on each other.

content.title: Crimson Climb
content.author: E.K. Johnston
content.description: After the events of Solo, Qi'ra survives within the brutal ranks of Crimson Dawn — climbing through its hierarchy with cunning and ruthlessness, shaping the woman she is becoming in the galaxy's underworld.

content.title: Lando's Luck
content.author: Justina Ireland
content.description: When a young girl named Rinetta Gan stows away aboard the Millennium Falcon in search of her kidnapped father, she finds herself caught up in one of Lando Calrissian's most chaotic — and profitable — schemes yet.

content.title: Choose Your Destiny: A Han & Chewie Adventure
content.author: Cavan Scott
content.description: YOU decide what Han Solo and Chewbacca do next — from daring heists to harrowing escapes — in this choose-your-own-path adventure that puts the fate of the Millennium Falcon's most famous crew in your hands.

content.title: A New Dawn
content.author: John Jackson Miller
content.description: A cynical former Jedi and an idealistic rebel cross paths on an Imperial-controlled mining world — setting in motion events that will bring Kanan Jarrus and Hera Syndulla together and kindle the spark of rebellion.

content.title: Star Wars: Lando - Double or Nothing
content.description: A young Lando Calrissian con job tying into the Solo film era.

content.title: Beckett
content.description: Three short heists featuring the Solo mentor figure Tobias Beckett's crew.

content.title: Solo: A Star Wars Story
content.description: The early adventures of Han Solo, from his escape off a grim homeworld to his first brush with the criminal underworld — including a fateful heist, a legendary ship, and a lifelong co-pilot.

content.title: Solo: A Star Wars Story: Expanded Edition
content.author: Mur Lafferty
content.description: The novelization of Solo: A Star Wars Story — expanding on Han's early adventures, the Kessel Run, and the crew of the Millennium Falcon with additional scenes and deeper character moments.

content.title: Star Wars: Solo Graphic Novel Adaptation
content.author: Alessandro Ferrari
content.description: A graphic novel adaptation of Solo: A Star Wars Story, following Han Solo's early adventures — from a desperate escape off Corellia to the legendary Kessel Run and his fateful first steps into the criminal underworld.

content.title: Solo: A Star Wars Story Adaptation
content.description: A comic adaptation of the Solo film, following Han's earliest adventures and heists.

content.title: Solo: A Star Wars Story Read-Along Storybook and CD
content.author: Nate Millici

content.title: Solo: A Star Wars Story Golden Book
content.author: Barbara Winthrop

content.title: Solo: A Star Wars Story: Meet the Crew
content.author: Ella Patrick

content.title: Solo: A Star Wars Story: Train Heist
content.author: Ella Patrick

content.title: Star Wars: Beyond Victory - A Mixed Reality Playset
content.description: A mixed reality playset blending the thrilling world of podracing with an original story. Players follow aspiring podracer Volo, whose life is upended under the mentorship of the infamous Sebulba. Features Adventure, Arcade, and Playset modes.

content.title: Star Wars: Obi-Wan Kenobi
content.description: A haunted and diminished Obi-Wan Kenobi is pulled out of his lonely desert exile ten years after the fall of the Jedi, forced to confront enemies from his past on a mission that tests everything he has left.

content.title: Star Wars: Obi-Wan Kenobi
content.description: A comic adaptation of the Obi-Wan Kenobi series during the Jedi Master's Tatooine exile.

content.title: Star Wars Jedi: Survivor
content.description: Five years after Fallen Order, Cal Kestis is the last Jedi standing between the Empire and the dawn of a new hope. On the run with the crew of the Mantis, Cal discovers a mysterious portal that could change the fate of the galaxy.

content.title: Star Wars: Andor
content.description: A ground-level, espionage-driven prequel to Rogue One following Cassian Andor's gradual radicalisation — tracing how an ordinary man becomes a committed revolutionary against the Empire's suffocating machinery.

content.title: Servants of the Empire: Edge of the Galaxy
content.author: Jason Fry
content.description: Zare Leonis has dreamed of attending the Imperial Academy on Lothal his whole life — but when his Force-sensitive sister disappears into the Empire's grip, Zare realizes the only way to find her is to enrol himself and learn the truth from the inside.

content.title: Battlefront: Twilight Company
content.author: Alexander Freed
content.description: A ground-level view of the Galactic Civil War through the eyes of the 61st Mobile Infantry — soldiers, refugees, and deserters — as Twilight Company fights a brutal campaign across multiple worlds with no end in sight.

content.title: Ezra's Gamble
content.author: Ryder Windham
content.description: Before joining the crew of the Ghost, teenage street kid Ezra Bridger must outwit the ruthless bounty hunter Bossk and survive a dangerous mission in the criminal underworld of Lothal.

content.title: Servants of the Empire: Rebel in the Ranks
content.author: Jason Fry
content.description: Inside the Imperial Academy, Zare Leonis digs deeper into the Empire's sinister experiments while maintaining his cover — but as his double life grows more dangerous, he discovers the secrets he's uncovering could cost him everything.

content.title: Servants of the Empire: Imperial Justice
content.author: Jason Fry
content.description: Transferred to a new posting far from Lothal, Zare Leonis must navigate an unfamiliar environment while his connection to the Ghost crew deepens — all while the Empire tightens its grasp and his mission grows ever more perilous.

content.title: Servants of the Empire: The Secret Academy
content.author: Jason Fry
content.description: Zare Leonis's undercover mission reaches its climax at a hidden Imperial facility where the darkest secrets of the Empire's experiments are finally revealed — including the truth about what happened to his sister.

content.title: Star Wars: Kanan
content.description: The backstory of Rebels' Kanan Jarrus, from Padawan survivor of Order 66 to reluctant rebel.

content.title: Star Wars Rebels Shorts
content.description: Four short animated vignettes released ahead of the Rebels premiere, introducing the crew of the Ghost as they clash with Imperial forces and cross paths with a street kid named Ezra Bridger.

content.title: Star Wars Rebels

episodes.title: In the Name of the Rebellion

content.description: Years before the Battle of Yavin, a scrappy crew of misfits aboard a small freighter plants seeds of rebellion in an occupied system, slowly connecting with a larger resistance and guiding a teenager with a rare gift in the Force.

content.title: The Secret Jedi: The Adventures of Kanan Jarrus: Rebel Leader
content.author: Benjamin Harper

content.title: Spark of Rebellion: A Star Wars Rebels Cinestory Comic
content.author: IDW Publishing
content.description: A cinestory comic adaptation of the Rebels pilot, introducing the crew of the Ghost as they take in a young Force-sensitive boy and spark the beginning of a rebellion against the Empire on Lothal.

content.title: Path of the Jedi: A Star Wars Rebels Cinestory Comic
content.author: IDW Publishing
content.description: A cinestory comic adaptation of a pivotal Rebels Season 2 episode, as Ezra Bridger enters a Jedi temple and must face his deepest fears in order to take his next step on the path of the Jedi.

content.title: Maul: A Star Wars Rebels Cinestory Comic
content.author: IDW Publishing
content.description: A cinestory comic adaptation of the Rebels Season 3 finale, in which the paths of Ezra Bridger, Kanan Jarrus, and the obsessed Maul all converge on the sands of Tatooine for a final reckoning.

content.title: Star Wars Rebels: Ghost Raid
content.description: A browser game set during the early days of the Spectres crew, in which players help defend the Ghost from Imperial attack.

content.title: Star Wars Rebels: Rebel Strike
content.description: A turn-based strategy browser game in which players command the Spectres through tactical missions against Imperial forces.

content.title: Star Wars Rebels: Chopper Chase
content.description: A browser game centred on the Ghost's irascible astromech droid Chopper, navigating obstacles and Imperial hazards.

content.title: Star Wars Rebels: Team Tactics
content.description: An arcade browser game loosely adapting the Siege of Lothal, putting the Spectres crew up against Imperial forces on Lothal's capital.

content.title: Star Wars Rebels: Recon Missions
content.description: A side-scrolling platformer mobile game set in the Star Wars Rebels universe, in which players control Ezra Bridger on missions against the Galactic Empire across multiple levels and environments.

content.title: Star Wars Rebels: Imperial Heist
content.description: An endless-runner browser game set during the Rebels era, in which players navigate Imperial-controlled territory as a member of the growing rebellion.

content.title: Star Wars Rebels: Strike Missions
content.description: A browser game featuring the Season 2 cast of Rebels, sending players on combat missions against the Empire across a variety of dangerous locales.

content.title: Star Wars Rebels: Special Ops
content.description: A browser game using characters and elements from Rebels, tasking players with covert special operations missions alongside the crew of the Ghost.

content.title: Leia, Princess of Alderaan
content.author: Claudia Gray
content.description: At sixteen, Leia Organa must prove herself worthy of the Alderaanian throne through acts of courage and service — while quietly uncovering the Rebellion her parents have been secretly building, and choosing her own path.

content.title: Thrawn
content.author: Timothy Zahn
content.description: The story of how the alien tactician Thrawn rose through the Imperial ranks — told through his own eyes and those of a young Imperial officer caught in his orbit, as Thrawn dissects enemies through art, culture, and cold genius.

content.title: Star Wars: Thrawn
content.description: A comic adaptation of Timothy Zahn's novel charting Thrawn's calculating rise through the ranks of the Imperial military.

content.title: Thrawn: Alliances
content.author: Timothy Zahn
content.description: Darth Vader and Thrawn are sent on a joint mission to the Unknown Regions — a mission that parallels an earlier encounter between Anakin Skywalker and Thrawn during the Clone Wars, revealing the complicated history between them.

content.title: Star Wars: Thrawn: Alliances
content.description: A comic adaptation of Zahn's novel pairing Thrawn with Darth Vader on a secret mission.

content.title: Thrawn: Treason
content.author: Timothy Zahn
content.description: Thrawn is ordered to prove the value of his TIE Defender project against the Death Star program — a political battle that sends him on a mission into the Unknown Regions and forces him to choose between loyalty and principle.

content.title: Star Wars: Han Solo & Chewbacca
content.description: A Han-and-Chewie caper set during their smuggling years before the films.

content.title: Rebel Rising
content.author: Beth Revis
content.description: Filling in the years between Rogue One's prologue and its main story — Jyn Erso's life after being abandoned by Saw Gerrera, the hardships that shaped her, and the long road that brought her to the Rebellion.

content.title: Star Wars: Obi-Wan
content.description: An aging Obi-Wan recounts memories from across his life during his lonely exile on Tatooine.

issues.title: A Shadow Falls on the Padawan

content.title: Star Wars: Rogue One: Secret Mission
content.author: Jason Fry

content.title: Guardians of the Whills
content.author: Greg Rucka
content.description: On the holy moon of Jedha under brutal Imperial occupation, temple guardians Chirrut Îmwe and Baze Malbus quietly resist the Empire while protecting the faithful — until a job for a desperate young rebel sets them on a collision course with the galaxy's fate.

content.title: Guardians of the Whills: The Manga
content.author: Jon Tsuei
content.description: A manga-style graphic novel following Chirrut Îmwe and Baze Malbus — Guardians of the Whills on the holy city of Jedha — as they protect their community under the crushing weight of Imperial occupation.

content.title: Rogue One: A Star Wars Story
content.description: A band of rebels with little to lose band together on a desperate, unsanctioned mission to steal the plans for the Empire's planet-killing superweapon — a mission the galaxy cannot afford to fail.

content.title: Star Wars: Rogue One Adaptation
content.description: A comic adaptation of Rogue One and the desperate mission to steal the Death Star plans.

content.title: Star Wars: Rogue One Graphic Novel Adaptation
content.author: Alessandro Ferrari
content.description: A graphic novel adaptation of Rogue One: A Star Wars Story, following Jyn Erso and a band of rebels on their desperate, unsanctioned mission to steal the plans for the Empire's planet-killing superweapon.

content.title: Rogue One: Boots on the Ground
content.description: A browser companion game released alongside Rogue One, drawing on the film's characters and events to put players in the thick of the Rebel assault to steal the Death Star plans.

content.title: Vader Immortal – Episode I
content.description: The first chapter of an immersive VR trilogy. Players are smugglers captured by Darth Vader and brought to his fortress on Mustafar, where an ancient secret connected to a power greater than the Force awaits.

content.title: Vader Immortal – Episode II
content.description: In the second chapter of the Vader Immortal trilogy, the mystery of Mustafar deepens as players learn the true nature of Vader's obsession with the ancient Bright Star artifact.

content.title: Vader Immortal – Episode III
content.description: The thrilling conclusion to the Vader Immortal trilogy. Players must face Darth Vader himself in a final confrontation deep within the Mustafar fortress as the fate of the Bright Star is decided.

content.title: Star Wars Battlefront
content.description: An action shooter set across iconic original trilogy battlegrounds including Hoth, Endor, and Sullust. Players fight as soldiers of the Rebel Alliance or the Galactic Empire in large-scale multiplayer battles.

content.title: Star Wars: Vader - Dark Visions
content.description: Standalone tales viewing Darth Vader through the eyes of those who encounter him.

content.title: Star Wars: The Original Trilogy – A Graphic Novel
content.author: Alessandro Ferrari
content.description: A graphic novel adaptation of the original trilogy — A New Hope, The Empire Strikes Back, and Return of the Jedi — condensing the foundational three films of the Skywalker Saga into one illustrated volume.

content.title: Star Wars: A New Hope Cinestory Comic
content.author: IDW Publishing
content.description: A cinestory comic adaptation of Star Wars: A New Hope, recreating the iconic film panel by panel through full-colour illustrated artwork as a young farmboy joins the Rebellion against the Empire.

content.title: Star Wars: Episode IV – A New Hope
content.description: A young man's ordinary life on a remote desert planet is upended when he joins a smuggler, an old hermit, and a desperate princess in a mission to destroy the Empire's most fearsome weapon.

content.title: Episode IV: A New Hope Read-Along Storybook and CD
content.author: Randy Thornton

content.title: A New Hope Big Golden Book
content.author: Geof Smith

content.title: The Adventures of Luke Skywalker, Jedi Knight
content.author: Tony DiTerlizzi

content.title: Star Wars Movie Theater Storybook & Lightsaber Projector
content.author: Benjamin Harper

content.title: Star Wars in Pictures: The Original Trilogy
content.author: Ryder Windham

content.title: The Power of the Dark Side
content.author: Benjamin Harper

content.title: You've Never Heard of the Millennium Falcon?
content.author: Erin Rose Wage

content.title: Luke and the Lost Jedi Temple
content.author: Jason Fry

content.title: The Original Trilogy Read-Along Storybook and CD Collection
content.author: Randy Thornton

content.title: Star Wars Unfolds: The Original Trilogy
content.author: Lucasfilm Ltd.

content.title: Star Wars: A New Hope die-cut children's book
content.author: Ryder Windham

content.title: A New Hope: A Collector's Classic Board Book
content.author: Howard Chaykin

content.title: Star Wars: Princess Leia
content.description: Immediately after the Death Star's destruction, Leia sets out to save the scattered survivors of Alderaan.

content.title: Star Wars (2015)
content.description: The flagship original-trilogy ongoing, following the Rebel heroes between Episodes IV and V.

arcs.arc: The Last Flight of the Harbinger

content.title: Star Wars: Darth Vader (2015)
content.description: Vader investigates the Rebel pilot who destroyed the Death Star, running parallel to Star Wars (2015).

content.title: Star Wars: Vader Down
content.description: The crossover event in which Darth Vader takes on the entire Rebel fleet alone.

content.title: Star Wars: Lando
content.description: Lando Calrissian pulls a daring heist on a mysterious Imperial luxury ship.

content.title: Star Wars: Chewbacca (2015)
content.description: Stranded on a backwater world, Chewbacca helps a young girl stand up against Imperial oppression.

content.title: Star Wars: Han Solo
content.description: Han enters a legendary starship race while running a secret mission for the Rebellion.

content.title: Star Wars: Doctor Aphra (2016)
content.description: The morally flexible rogue archaeologist's first solo ongoing, running parallel to Star Wars (2015).

content.title: Star Wars: The Screaming Citadel
content.description: Luke Skywalker and Doctor Aphra team up at a sinister citadel ruled by a deadly queen.

content.title: Star Wars: Target Vader
content.description: A bounty-hunter syndicate is hired to take down Darth Vader once and for all.

content.title: Star Wars: Age of Rebellion
content.description: Character-spotlight one-shots for the heroes and villains of the Rebellion era.

content.title: Star Wars: TIE Fighter
content.description: An elite Imperial starfighter squadron's missions, told from the Empire's perspective.

content.title: Star Wars: Yoda
content.description: An anthology of Yoda stories spanning his long life, framed during his exile on Dagobah.

content.title: Star Wars: Heroes Path
content.description: A puzzle game in which players guide iconic Star Wars heroes through increasingly complex maze-based levels, unlocking new characters from across the saga as they progress.

content.title: Star Wars: Commander
content.description: A base-building real-time strategy game in which players choose to fight for the Galactic Empire or the Rebel Alliance, constructing and defending bases while deploying troops in battles across the galaxy.

content.title: Heir to the Jedi
content.author: Kevin Hearne
content.description: Luke Skywalker takes on a solo mission for the Rebellion to rescue a valued slicer from Imperial captivity — and begins his first tentative steps toward understanding the Force without a master to guide him.

content.title: Star Wars Adventures: Destroyer Down
content.description: An all-ages adventure aboard a crashed Imperial Star Destroyer in the days after A New Hope.

content.title: Smuggler's Run: A Han Solo & Chewbacca Adventure
content.author: Greg Rucka
content.description: In the wake of the Battle of Yavin, Han Solo and Chewbacca are sent on an urgent Rebel mission to rescue a stranded spy — but the Empire has laid a deadly trap, and not everyone who flies into it comes back out.

content.title: The Weapon of a Jedi: A Luke Skywalker Adventure
content.author: Jason Fry
content.description: After the Battle of Yavin, Luke Skywalker is drawn by the Force to a remote world where he discovers the ruins of an ancient Jedi temple — and must begin teaching himself the ways of the Jedi before the Empire discovers what he has found.

content.title: The Mighty Chewbacca in the Forest of Fear!
content.author: Tom Angleberger
content.description: Chewbacca is on his own on a forest moon — and the mighty Wookiee must face terrifying creatures, treacherous terrain, and his own feelings about the friend he's been sent to rescue.

content.title: Choose Your Destiny: A Luke & Leia Adventure
content.author: Cavan Scott
content.description: The fate of the Rebellion is in YOUR hands. Luke Skywalker and Princess Leia face a dangerous mission — but every branch in the path leads somewhere different, and only the choices you make will determine if they succeed.

content.title: Star Wars: Smuggler's Run
content.description: A comic adaptation of the Han & Chewbacca young-reader novel, set between Episodes IV and V.

content.title: Star Wars: The Weapon of a Jedi
content.description: A comic adaptation of the Luke Skywalker young-reader novel, set between Episodes IV and V.

content.title: Doctor Aphra: An Audiobook Original
content.author: Sarah Kuhn
content.description: Left for dead by Darth Vader, rogue archaeologist Doctor Chelli Lona Aphra survives against all odds and sets off on a desperate quest to stay one step ahead of the Empire — pulling together a crew of misfits for a series of increasingly dangerous schemes across the galaxy.

content.title: Star Wars: Squadrons
content.description: An immersive starfighter combat game set in the aftermath of the Battle of Endor. Experience both sides of the conflict in a single-player campaign following New Republic pilot Vanguard Squadron and Imperial pilot Titan Squadron.

content.title: Star Wars: The Last Jedi – The Storms of Crait
content.description: A Rebel mission to the remote mineral world of Crait in the years after the Battle of Yavin.

content.title: Star Wars: Episode V – The Empire Strikes Back
content.description: The Empire launches a devastating counter-offensive against the Rebel Alliance. While the rebels flee across the galaxy, a young Jedi seeks out a legendary master to complete his training — and learns a truth that changes everything.

content.title: Episode V: The Empire Strikes Back Read-Along Storybook and CD
content.author: Randy Thornton

content.title: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back die-cut children's book
content.author: Ryder Windham

content.title: The Empire Strikes Back: A Collector's Classic Board Book
content.author: Al Williamson

content.title: Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back Screen Comix
content.author: Lucasfilm Ltd.
content.description: A screen comix adaptation of The Empire Strikes Back, presenting the film's drama through illustrated panels as the Rebel Alliance faces the Empire's devastating counter-offensive and Luke Skywalker learns a world-shattering truth.

content.title: Star Wars (2020)
content.description: The second-wave flagship ongoing, picking up immediately after The Empire Strikes Back.

content.title: Star Wars: Darth Vader (2020)
content.description: Vader's reckoning after learning Luke is his son, pursuing the buried truth of his own past.

content.title: Star Wars: Doctor Aphra (2020)
content.description: Aphra's second ongoing, chasing relics and trouble across the post-Hoth galaxy.

content.title: Star Wars: Bounty Hunters
content.description: Beilert Valance and a rogues' gallery of hunters chase contracts and settle old grudges.

content.title: Star Wars: War of the Bounty Hunters
content.description: The hunt for Han Solo in carbonite erupts into a galaxy-spanning war between crime lords and the Empire.

content.title: Star Wars: Crimson Reign
content.description: Crimson Dawn wages a shadow war against both the Empire and the Rebellion.

content.title: Star Wars: Hidden Empire
content.description: The climactic conclusion of the Crimson Dawn saga.

content.title: Star Wars: Dark Droids
content.description: A malevolent intelligence known as the Scourge corrupts droids across the galaxy.

content.title: Star Wars: Dark Droids: D-Squad
content.description: A companion miniseries following a band of droids fighting to survive the Dark Droids event.

content.title: Star Wars: Sana Starros
content.description: Han Solo's sometime-"wife" Sana navigates a chaotic family reunion and a job gone badly wrong.

content.title: Star Wars: Darth Vader – Black, White & Red
content.description: A stylized Darth Vader anthology rendered in black, white, and red (companion to the Maul title).

content.title: Star Wars: Yoda's Jedi Training
content.description: A browser game loosely adapting events from The Empire Strikes Back, in which players undergo lightsaber training under Yoda's guidance on the swamp planet Dagobah.

content.title: Star Wars Outlaws
content.description: Set in the period between The Empire Strikes Back and Return of the Jedi, Outlaws follows Kay Vess, a young scoundrel, and her companion Nix as they attempt to pull off the biggest heist in the Outer Rim — getting tangled up with the galaxy's most dangerous crime syndicates.

content.title: Moving Target: A Princess Leia Adventure
content.author: Cecil Castellucci & Jason Fry
content.description: On the eve of the Battle of Endor, Princess Leia leads a small volunteer squad on a dangerous decoy mission designed to draw Imperial attention away from the Rebel fleet — knowing that not all of them will make it back, and that the price of hope is sometimes everything.

content.title: Star Wars: Episode VI – Return of the Jedi
content.description: The Rebel Alliance rallies for a final strike against the Empire's new superweapon, while a young Jedi Knight faces his greatest test: convincing his father to return from the dark side before it is too late.

content.title: Star Wars: Tales of the Empire
content.description: An animated anthology series revealing untold stories from the age of the Empire, following characters forced to make defining choices under the crushing weight of Imperial rule.

content.title: Episode VI: Return of the Jedi Read-Along Storybook and CD
content.author: Randy Thornton

content.title: Leia and the Great Island Escape
content.author: Jason Fry

content.title: Return of the Jedi: A Collector's Classic Board Book
content.author: Ryder Windham

content.title: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi die-cut children's book
content.author: Al Williamson

content.title: Return of the Jedi: The Battle of Endor
content.author: Ella Patrick

content.title: Star Wars: Shattered Empire
content.description: The immediate aftermath of Return of the Jedi as the Rebellion presses its advantage against a fractured Empire.

content.title: Star Wars: Ewoks (2024)
content.description: The Ewoks of Endor in fresh adventures around the climactic Battle of Endor.

content.title: Star Wars: Return of the Jedi (2023)
content.description: A set of standalone one-shots celebrating Return of the Jedi, each spotlighting a different corner of the saga.

content.title: Star Wars: Uprising
content.description: An action RPG set in the immediate aftermath of the Battle of Endor, following a new hero fighting against Imperial remnants blockading the Anoat sector as news of the Emperor's death spreads.

content.title: Star Wars Battlefront II
content.description: Featuring a canonical single-player story following Imperial special forces commander Iden Versio from the Battle of Endor through the fall of the Empire, plus multiplayer battles spanning all eras — from the Clone Wars to the rise of the First Order.

content.title: The Princess and the Scoundrel
content.author: Beth Revis
content.description: In the immediate aftermath of the Battle of Endor, Leia and Han take a brief honeymoon aboard an Imperial luxury liner — only to discover the Empire is far from finished, and their first days of peace may be their last.

content.title: Hunted
content.description: A lone TIE fighter pilot separated from his squadron must outmaneuver New Republic forces in a desperate bid to survive after the fall of the Empire.

content.title: Alphabet Squadron
content.author: Alexander Freed
content.description: In the chaos following the Emperor's death, a New Republic Intelligence officer assembles a ragtag squadron of misfit pilots — each haunted by their own past — and points them at a deadly Imperial shadow wing that refuses to surrender.

content.title: Aftermath
content.author: Chuck Wendig
content.description: In the weeks after the Battle of Endor, Imperial remnants plot their next move on the planet Akiva — as a New Republic pilot, a bounty hunter, a former Imperial loyalty officer, and a teenage rebel collide in a fight for the galaxy's future.

content.title: Aftermath: Life Debt
content.author: Chuck Wendig
content.description: Han Solo goes rogue to liberate Wookiee slaves on Kashyyyk — drawing Norra Wexley and her crew into a mission that puts them on a collision course with one of the Empire's most dangerous surviving leaders.

content.title: Shadow Fall: An Alphabet Squadron Novel
content.author: Alexander Freed
content.description: Alphabet Squadron hunts the last remnants of the 204th Imperial Fighter Wing into the outer reaches of the galaxy — but the quarry is more dangerous than ever, and the hunters are fracturing from within.

content.title: Victory's Price: An Alphabet Squadron Novel
content.author: Alexander Freed
content.description: The final confrontation between Alphabet Squadron and the 204th approaches — but victory will demand a cost none of them anticipated, and the end of the war may not look like the one any of them imagined.

content.title: Aftermath: Empire's End
content.author: Chuck Wendig
content.description: The Galactic Civil War reaches its conclusion at the Battle of Jakku — as Norra Wexley and her crew, Admiral Rae Sloane, and the last of the Imperial fleet converge for a final reckoning that will determine the galaxy's fate.

content.title: Star Wars: Battle of Jakku — Insurgency Rising
content.description: Part one of a trilogy depicting the climactic battle that ended the Galactic Civil War.

content.title: Star Wars: Battle of Jakku — Republic Under Siege
content.description: The middle chapter of the Battle of Jakku trilogy as the New Republic fights to hold the line.

content.title: Star Wars: Battle of Jakku — Last Stand
content.description: The concluding chapter of the Battle of Jakku trilogy and the final defeat of the Empire.

content.title: Star Wars: Doctor Aphra – Chaos Agent
content.description: Aphra's New Republic-era return as the rogue archaeologist is pulled back into trouble.

content.title: Star Wars (2025)
content.description: A new flagship set in the post-Battle of Jakku New Republic era, following Luke, Leia, Han and Valance.

content.title: Star Wars: Han Solo - Hunt for the Falcon
content.description: An older Han Solo chases down his stolen Millennium Falcon across the New Republic galaxy.

content.title: Lost Stars
content.author: Claudia Gray
content.description: Two childhood friends from a backwater planet both join the Empire — one becomes a TIE pilot, the other eventually defects to the Rebellion — as their opposing paths and enduring bond trace the entire arc of the Galactic Civil War.

content.title: Last Shot
content.author: Daniel José Older
content.description: A dual-timeline thriller following Han Solo and Lando Calrissian — jumping between their wild younger days and the early years of the New Republic — as they hunt a dangerous criminal tied to a weapon capable of terrible destruction.

content.title: The Legends of Luke Skywalker
content.author: Ken Liu
content.description: Traveling aboard a cargo ship bound for Canto Bight, a crew of workers swap tales they have heard about the legendary Luke Skywalker — stories of miracles and monsters, of battles and grace, some true, some myth, all of them part of the galaxy's living memory.

content.title: Star Wars: The Mandalorian
content.description: A solitary bounty hunter operating far from the reach of the New Republic takes a job with an unusual payload — a mysterious child he cannot bring himself to hand over — and becomes an unlikely guardian.

content.title: Star Wars: The Mandalorian
content.description: A comic adaptation of the first season of The Mandalorian and Din Djarin's bond with Grogu.

content.title: Star Wars: The Mandalorian Season 2
content.description: A comic adaptation of the second season of The Mandalorian as Din Djarin searches for the Jedi.

content.title: The Mandalorian: Season 1: Volume 1
content.author: Lucasfilm Ltd.
content.description: A graphic novel adaptation of the opening chapters of The Mandalorian, following the title bounty hunter as a mysterious high-value target forces him to question everything he knows about his code.

content.title: Star Wars: The Mandalorian Season One Graphic Novel
content.author: Alessandro Ferrari
content.description: A graphic novel adaptation of The Mandalorian's first season, following Din Djarin's journey across the outer reaches of the galaxy as he struggles to protect his foundling charge from relentless pursuers.

content.title: Star Wars: The Mandalorian – The Graphic Novel of Season 2
content.author: Lucasfilm Ltd.
content.description: A graphic novel adaptation of The Mandalorian's second season, as Din Djarin scours the galaxy for the Jedi who can reunite Grogu with his people — forging unexpected alliances along the way.

content.title: The Mandalorian: The Rescue
content.author: Lucasfilm Ltd.
content.description: A graphic novel adaptation of The Mandalorian's Season 2 finale, as Mando and his allies launch a desperate rescue mission to recover Grogu from Moff Gideon's clutches.

content.title: The Mandalorian – The Graphic Novel of Season 3
content.author: Alessandro Ferrari
content.description: A graphic novel adaptation of The Mandalorian's third season, following Din Djarin and Grogu as they seek redemption through reclaiming the shattered homeworld of Mandalore.

content.title: The Mandalorian: This is the Way
content.author: Christopher Nichols

content.title: The Mandalorian: A Clan of Two
content.author: Brooke Vitale

content.title: The Mandalorian: The Path of the Force
content.author: Brooke Vitale

content.title: Star Wars: The Book of Boba Fett

episodes.title: Chapter 1: Stranger in a Strange Land
Chapter 3: The Streets of Mos Espa
Chapter 6: From the Desert Comes a Stranger
Chapter 7: In the Name of Honor

content.description: The notorious bounty hunter Boba Fett returns to Tatooine to claim the territory once ruled by Jabba the Hutt, confronting rival crime factions and old enemies as he attempts to rule through respect rather than fear.

content.title: Hunters: Battle for the Arena
content.author: Mark Oshiro
content.description: In the ruins of a former Imperial arena on the planet Vespaara, warriors from across the galaxy compete in the spectacle of Star Wars: Hunters — and one young challenger must prove they have what it takes to survive among legends.

content.title: Star Wars: Hunters
content.description: Set in the New Republic era after the fall of the Empire, Hunters is a competitive arena combat game where warriors from across the galaxy battle in the ruins of repurposed Imperial arenas on the planet Vespaara.

content.title: Grogu Cutest In The Galaxy
content.description: A series of bite-sized animated shorts featuring Grogu in playful, wordless vignettes full of charm and mischief, tied to the New Republic era.

content.title: Star Wars: The Mandalorian and Grogu
content.description: Din Djarin and Grogu face a new chapter of their journey together, drawn into dangers that test the bond between the Mandalorian warrior and the child he has sworn to protect.

content.title: Star Wars: Ahsoka

episodes.title: Part Eight: The Jedi, the Witch, and the Warlord

content.description: Ahsoka Tano pursues a trail of clues pointing to the return of a dangerous Imperial threat, while reckoning with her own past and the fractured relationship with a former apprentice who has chosen a different path.

content.title: Star Wars: Ahsoka
content.description: A comic adaptation of the Ahsoka series and the hunt to stop the return of Grand Admiral Thrawn.

content.title: Star Wars: Skeleton Crew

episodes.title: This Could Be a Real Adventure
Way, Way Out Past the Barrier
Very Interesting, as an Astrogation Problem
Can't Say I Remember No At Attin
You Have a Lot to Learn About Pirates
We're Gonna Be in So Much Trouble

content.description: Four kids from a peaceful, isolated planet stumble into the wider galaxy by accident and find themselves completely out of their depth — stranded in a lawless corner of space with only a mysterious stranger to guide them home.

content.title: Poe Dameron: Free Fall
content.author: Alex Segura
content.description: Long before becoming the Resistance's greatest pilot, a teenage Poe Dameron runs away from home and falls in with a crew of spice runners — learning hard lessons about loyalty, consequence, and who he wants to become.

content.title: Shadow of the Sith
content.author: Adam Christopher
content.description: Luke Skywalker and Lando Calrissian search for a family hiding from the Sith — following a trail of dark-side breadcrumbs that leads toward Exegol and fills in the untold history behind the events of The Rise of Skywalker.

content.title: Bloodline
content.author: Claudia Gray
content.description: Six years before the rise of the First Order, Senator Leia Organa navigates a fractured New Republic Senate while a conspiracy threatens to tear the galaxy apart — and forces her to confront a truth that will change everything.

content.title: Star Wars: The Rise of Kylo Ren
content.description: Ben Solo's fall to the dark side and the formation of the Knights of Ren.

content.title: Force Collector
content.author: Kevin Shinick
content.description: A teenage boy with the ability to sense Force echoes in old objects embarks on a road trip through the galaxy — uncovering relics and stories from the Jedi Order's past as the First Order's shadow begins to fall.

content.title: Phasma
content.author: Delilah S. Dawson
content.description: The origin story of Captain Phasma — a tale of brutal survival on a harsh world, ruthless ambition, and the cold pragmatism that forged one of the First Order's most feared commanders.

content.title: Star Wars Resistance
content.description: A young pilot is sent undercover to a remote racing station on the galaxy's frontier, where he uncovers the growing shadow of the First Order in the months leading up to The Force Awakens.

content.title: Star Wars Resistance: Meet the Pilots
content.author: Ella Patrick

content.title: Star Wars: Poe Dameron
content.description: Resistance ace Poe Dameron and Black Squadron in the run-up to and aftermath of The Force Awakens.

content.title: Star Wars Special: C-3PO
content.description: The story behind C-3PO's mysterious red arm seen in The Force Awakens.

content.title: Before the Awakening
content.author: Greg Rucka
content.description: Three stories set in the weeks before The Force Awakens: a stormtrooper named Finn who begins to question everything he has been taught, a Resistance pilot named Poe Dameron on a vital mission, and a scavenger named Rey who discovers something unexpected on Jakku.

content.title: Join the Resistance
content.author: Ben Acker & Ben Blacker
content.description: Mattis Banz has always dreamed of joining the Resistance — but when he finally gets the chance, he discovers that being a hero is a lot messier, stranger, and more dangerous than anything he imagined, especially with the misfit squad he's been assigned to.

content.title: Join the Resistance: Escape from Vodran
content.author: Ben Acker & Ben Blacker
content.description: Captured and thrown into an Imperial-era prison on the swamp world of Vodran, Mattis and his squad must pull together to stage a daring escape — while uncovering a sinister secret the First Order has been keeping buried there.

content.title: Join the Resistance: Attack on Starkiller Base
content.author: Ben Acker & Ben Blacker
content.description: As the Resistance launches its desperate assault on Starkiller Base, Mattis and his squad face their most dangerous mission yet — fighting in the shadow of a weapon powerful enough to destroy entire star systems.

content.title: Star Wars: Episode VII – The Force Awakens
content.description: A young scavenger, a disillusioned stormtrooper, and a droid carrying a critical secret are swept into a conflict between the crumbling Resistance and a new order rising to fill the Empire's place.

content.title: The Force Awakens: Movie Theater Storybook & BB-8 Projector
content.author: Benjamin Harper

content.title: The Force Awakens Read-Along Storybook and CD
content.author: Elizabeth Schaefer

content.title: Star Wars: The Force Awakens die-cut children's book
content.author: Elizabeth Schaefer

content.title: Star Wars: The Force Awakens Adaptation
content.description: A comic adaptation of The Force Awakens and the search for the missing Luke Skywalker.

content.title: Star Wars: The Force Awakens Graphic Novel Adaptation
content.author: Alessandro Ferrari
content.description: A graphic novel adaptation of The Force Awakens, following a young scavenger and a disillusioned stormtrooper who stumble onto a droid carrying a map to the last Jedi — and into the middle of a galaxy-defining conflict.

content.title: Star Wars: Captain Phasma
content.description: How the First Order commander escaped Starkiller Base, bridging Episodes VII and VIII.

content.title: Star Wars: Batuu Bounty Hunters
content.description: A casual mobile game set on the planet Batuu, in which players track down bounty targets across the Black Spire Outpost and surrounding areas of Galaxy's Edge.

content.title: Star Wars: X-wing Fighter
content.description: A browser game adapting events from The Force Awakens, in which players pilot an X-wing on missions against the First Order.

content.title: Canto Bight
content.author: Saladin Ahmed, Rae Carson, Mira Grant, John Jackson Miller
content.description: Four novellas set in the glittering casino city of Canto Bight — weaving interconnected stories of gamblers, grifters, and dreamers on the night Finn and Rose passed through, painting a vivid portrait of the galaxy's gilded inequality.

content.title: Star Wars: The Last Jedi – DJ – Most Wanted
content.description: A solo story for the codebreaker DJ in the days before The Last Jedi.

content.title: The Last Jedi: Cobalt Squadron
content.author: Elizabeth Wein
content.description: Rose and Paige Tico and the bombers of Cobalt Squadron are on a critical mission at the edge of the galaxy when the First Order launches a devastating assault — and the two sisters must fight alongside their crew to survive and keep the Resistance's hope alive.

content.title: Star Wars: Episode VIII – The Last Jedi
content.description: With the Resistance on the run and dwindling fast, desperate gambits are launched on multiple fronts while the connection between a young hero and a fearsome enforcer of the dark side deepens in unexpected ways.

content.title: The Last Jedi: Rose and Finn's Secret Mission
content.author: Ella Patrick

content.title: The Last Jedi Movie Theater Storybook & Movie Projector
content.author: Michael Kogge

content.title: The Last Jedi Read-Along Storybook and CD
content.author: Elizabeth Schaefer

content.title: Star Wars: The Last Jedi die-cut children's book
content.author: Elizabeth Schaefer

content.title: Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge: A Batuu Adventure!
content.author: Jeneanne DeBois

content.title: Star Wars: The Last Jedi Adaptation
content.description: A comic adaptation of The Last Jedi as the Resistance flees the First Order.

content.title: Star Wars: The Last Jedi Graphic Novel Adaptation
content.author: Alessandro Ferrari
content.description: A graphic novel adaptation of The Last Jedi, following the Resistance's desperate flight from the First Order as an unlikely bond deepens between a young hero and a conflicted dark-side enforcer.

content.title: Star Wars: Legacy of Vader
content.description: Supreme Leader Kylo Ren's journey between The Last Jedi and The Rise of Skywalker.

content.title: Star Wars: Droid Repair Bay
content.description: A mobile VR experience set aboard the Resistance flagship. Players repair and maintain the droids of the Resistance fleet in preparation for the fight against the First Order.

content.title: Star Wars: Tales from the Galaxy's Edge
