content.description: A VR adventure on the frontier planet of Batuu during the sequel era. Players take the role of a droid technician who gets caught up in a conflict involving the First Order, the Resistance, and the local criminal underworld of Black Spire Outpost.

content.title: Star Wars: Tales from the Galaxy's Edge – Last Call
content.description: A standalone VR sequel set in the cantina of Black Spire Outpost on Batuu. Last Call features new characters and an original story exploring the criminal underworld of the Outer Rim.

content.title: Resistance Reborn
content.author: Rebecca Roanhorse
content.description: In the aftermath of the Resistance's devastating losses, Poe Dameron, Finn, and their allies scramble to rebuild — reaching out to old contacts and new allies across the galaxy before the First Order can extinguish them entirely.

content.title: Galaxy's Edge: Black Spire
content.author: Delilah S. Dawson
content.description: A Resistance spy is sent to the remote outpost world of Batuu — Black Spire Outpost — to recruit allies and find a haven for the Resistance, deep in a frontier town where everyone has something to hide.

content.title: Star Wars: Galaxy's Edge
content.description: A tie-in to the theme-park land, centered on the outlaw outpost of Black Spire on Batuu.

content.title: A Crash of Fate
content.author: Zoraida Córdova
content.description: Two childhood friends are reunited by chance on Batuu — a world of secrets and scoundrels — and must navigate old feelings and new dangers as a simple delivery job spirals into something far more dangerous.

content.title: Star Wars: Allegiance
content.description: A Rise of Skywalker prelude as the Resistance scrambles to find new allies.

content.title: Choose Your Destiny: A Finn & Poe Adventure
content.author: Cavan Scott
content.description: YOU are in command of the Resistance's most dynamic duo. As Finn and Poe Dameron race into First Order territory on a vital mission, every decision is yours — and the wrong choice could doom them both.

content.title: Spark of the Resistance
content.author: Justina Ireland
content.description: Rey, Poe Dameron, and Rose Tico travel to a remote world on a secret mission to protect a community threatened by First Order forces — but the planet holds unexpected dangers, and the three heroes must decide just how far the Resistance can stretch to help those in need.

content.title: Pirate's Price
content.author: Lou Anders
content.description: The legendary — and legendarily unreliable — pirate Hondo Ohnaka recounts his most dramatic adventures in a collection of tall tales that blend daring fact with shameless fiction, proving once again that no one tells a story quite like Hondo.

content.title: Star Wars: Episode IX – The Rise of Skywalker
content.description: The Skywalker Saga reaches its conclusion as the Resistance faces an ancient and resurgent evil, forcing allies old and new to come together for one last stand to decide the fate of the galaxy.

content.title: Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker die-cut children's book
content.author: Ella Patrick

content.title: Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker Adaptation
content.description: A comic adaptation of The Rise of Skywalker and the final confrontation with the resurrected Emperor.

content.title: Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker Graphic Novel Adaptation
content.author: Alessandro Ferrari
content.description: A graphic novel adaptation of The Rise of Skywalker, chronicling Rey's final confrontation with Palpatine and the ultimate battle between the Resistance and the Final Order.

content.title: Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker — The Screenplay in Comics Form
content.author: Lucasfilm Ltd.
content.description: The complete screenplay of The Rise of Skywalker rendered as a graphic novel with full-color movie stills and dialogue.

content.title: Path of the Lightsaber Vol. 1
content.author: Lucasfilm Ltd.
content.description: An anthology graphic novel following Force-users across the galaxy far, far away, tracing the legacy of the lightsaber through generations of Jedi and Sith.

content.title: Star Wars: Halcyon Legacy
content.description: Tales told aboard the Halcyon starcruiser, spanning eras of galactic history.

content.title: Life Day
content.description: A holiday anthology of stories across the timeline, framed around the Wookiee celebration of Life Day.

content.title: The Last Order
content.author: Kwame Mbalia
content.description: In the aftermath of the Battle of Exegol, a young hero navigates a galaxy reshaping itself after the First Order's fall — confronting remnants of the old regime and discovering what it means to rebuild hope.

content.title: Star Wars: Droid Diaries
content.description: A short-form animated comedy series following R2-D2 and BB-8 through chaotic, laugh-out-loud misadventures during the Sequel era, from lost lightsabers to bounty hunters hot on their trail.

episodes.title: R2-D2 and BB-8's Quest for a New Arm!
R2-D2, BB-8 and Rey's Lightsaber on the Loose!
R2-D2 & BB-8 Save The Millennium Falcon!
Who's Making That Noise in The Millennium Falcon?!
R2-D2 and BB-8's Super Snowy Shenanigans
R2-D2 and BB-8 Chased By A Bounty Hunter?!

content.title: Star Wars Forces of Destiny
content.description: A collection of animated micro-shorts celebrating acts of courage and kindness from heroes across every era of the Star Wars saga, featuring Ahsoka, Padmé, Leia, Sabine, Rey, Rose, and more.

content.title: Star Wars Forces of Destiny
content.description: Hero-spotlight one-shots tied to the animated shorts, spanning heroines across the saga.

content.title: Star Wars Adventures (2017)
content.description: The flagship all-ages anthology, two stories per issue spanning the whole saga.

content.title: Star Wars Adventures (2020)
content.description: The relaunched all-ages anthology, with stories from across galactic history.

content.title: Star Wars Adventures: Tales from Vader's Castle
content.description: A spooky anthology of horror tales framed around Vader's brooding Mustafar fortress.

content.title: Star Wars Adventures: Return to Vader's Castle
content.description: A second horror-themed anthology miniseries returning to Vader's fortress of fear.

content.title: Star Wars Adventures: Shadow of Vader's Castle
content.description: A standalone horror follow-up to the Vader's Castle anthologies.

content.title: Star Wars Adventures: Ghosts of Vader's Castle
content.description: The final Vader's Castle horror-anthology miniseries.

content.title: Star Wars: Hyperspace Stories
content.description: An all-ages anthology spanning the whole timeline, with a hidden through-line across its run.

content.title: Star Wars: Hyperspace Stories—Codebreaker
content.description: A Hyperspace Stories miniseries weaving its tale across multiple eras of the galaxy.

content.title: Tales from the Rancor Pit
content.description: A Halloween horror anthology set around Jabba's palace and the depths of the rancor pit.

content.title: Tales from the Death Star
content.description: A horror anthology themed around the Empire's planet-killing battle station.

content.title: Star Wars: Tales From the Nightlands
content.description: A Nightsisters and dark-side-themed horror anthology miniseries.

content.title: Revelations
content.description: An annual-style one-shot teasing upcoming storylines across several eras of the saga.

content.title: Star Wars Galaxy of Creatures
content.description: An animated documentary-style shorts series following droid SF-R3 as she travels the galaxy on behalf of the Galactic Society of Creature Enthusiasts, learning about beloved Star Wars wildlife from Banthas to Rancors.

content.title: Star Wars Galactic Pals
content.description: A cheerful animated shorts series following Miree, a caretaker droid, as she nurtures younglings of different Star Wars species — from Ewoks and Wookiees to Jawas and Rancors.

content.title: Unlock!: Star Wars Escape Game
content.description: The digital companion app for the Unlock!: Star Wars card-based escape room game by Space Cowboys, used to scan cards, validate codes, and access story elements and hints during play.
